name: c/d multicare + metabolic weight dry dog food
description: just like the human obesity epidemic, over 55% of the pet population is overweight. even a little extra weight can impact the pet's quality of life and relationship with family because that extra weight can reduce play time, put your dog at risk of urinary conditions and affect the lifelong general health of your dog. controlled levels of minerals to maintain urinary health optimizes the bladder environment to support future urinary health synergistic blend of ingredients to activate your dog's metabolism
